title: Hover Highlight
description: Highlights the hovered slot with a color of your choice includes a opacity slider and a extra hotbar feature
body:
**Hover Highlight**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow)
--- Hover Highlight changes the background tint of the slot you're hovering in inventories, and you can also have it tint the selected hotbar slot too if you want. It is client-side and mainly just makes inventory highlighting look cleaner and easier to see. You can change both colors in the config and alpha/opacity/transparency works too so you can make it more subtle or more visible depending on what you want. I would write more about the mod but that's really all there is to it, if you have any suggestions let me know! Works across 1.21 - 26.1.1 **Requires** - Silicon: [Silicon](https://modrinth.com/mod/silicons) - Mod Menu: [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - YACL: [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
